steps.title: Use the pyramid volume
steps.content:
For a square pyramid with side length $s$ and height $15$, substitute the given volume into the pyramid volume formula.
$$180=\frac{1}{3}\cdot s^2\cdot15$$

steps.title: Find the base side
steps.content:
Simplify and solve for the positive side length.
$$180=5s^2$$
$$36=s^2$$
$$s=6$$

steps.title: Find the base perimeter
steps.content:
The base is a square, so its perimeter is $4s$.
$$4(6)=24$$
The answer is 24.
